runedeath0000000.name: Rune: Death
runedeath0000000.description: You learn Rune of Death, allowing you to manipulate unholy power.

gesturefan000000.name: Gesture: Fan
gesturefan000000.description:
Focus the essence of a rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity. If used with Earth, this might hurl a spray of stone in an arc, while using it with Kinesis might carve a slice across multiple foes.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree, 6 foot cone, dealing 6 base damage on a successful attack.

falseAppearance0.name: False Appearance
falseAppearance0.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

archetype.name: Elemental Sprite
archetype.description: Sprites are lesser elementals which are embodiments of their raw element, but lack the sapience of their greater kin.

taxonomy.name: Skeleton
taxonomy.description: Undeathly denizens fashioned of bone and sinew.

runeflame0000000.name: Rune: Flame
runeflame0000000.description: You learn Rune of Flame, allowing you to weave the arcane element of fire.

fireAbsorption00.name: Fire Absorption
fireAbsorption00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within scorching environments. Its Fire resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

gesturefan000000.name: Gesture: Fan
gesturefan000000.description:
Focus the essence of a rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity. If used with Earth, this might hurl a spray of stone in an arc, while using it with Kinesis might carve a slice across multiple foes.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree, 6 foot cone, dealing 6 base damage on a successful attack.

gestureaspect000.name: Gesture: Aspect
gestureaspect000.description:
Infuse the essence of a Rune into the self, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect.

archetype.name: Elemental Visitor
archetype.description: Visitors are embodiments of raw elemental energy that assume forms that are vaguely humanoid in shape. Unlike their lesser kin, Elemental Visitors are are capable of communication and understanding, although their motivations are seldom aligned with those of mortals.

taxonomy.name: Fire Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Fire.

ancestralForm000.name: Ancestral Manifestation
ancestralForm000.description: The Ancestral Guardian is an incorporeal manifestation of watchful spirits. It cannot be harmed, moved against its will, or broken, and other creatures may pass freely through its space. Its overwhelming presence on the battlefield causes it to count as three creatures when determining whether an enemy is Flanked.

biography.public: The Ancestral Guardian is less a creature than a presence: the gathered spirits of those who came before, called into the world by a @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.warden0000000000]{Warden} through the Ancestral Grove. It cannot be commanded or reasoned with and offers no speech. It simply keeps watch over the living for as long as the Warden's communion endures.
biography.appearance: A translucent figure woven of shifting bark, leaf, and root, lit from within by a soft green glow. It holds no fixed form, drifting between the silhouettes of ancestors half-remembered, and casts neither shadow nor weight upon the ground it guards.

archetype.name: Ancestral Ward
archetype.description: A watchful spirit that anchors a protective grove.

taxonomy.name: Ancestral Spirit
taxonomy.description: An incorporeal manifestation of ancestral spirits, summoned to watch over the living. It has no corporeal body to wound and no will to break.

runeStorm0000000.name: Rune: Storm
runeStorm0000000.description:
The chaotic force of raw, electrical energy. The Storm rune governs sources of electrical energy and electrical discharge. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

The Storm rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electricity damage to Health.

electricityAbsor.name: Electricity Absorption
electricityAbsor.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to take lightning blasts in stride. Its Electricity resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

gesturefan000000.name: Gesture: Fan
gesturefan000000.description:
Focus the essence of a rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity. If used with Earth, this might hurl a spray of stone in an arc, while using it with Kinesis might carve a slice across multiple foes.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree, 6 foot cone, dealing 6 base damage on a successful attack.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect.

archetype.name: Elemental Visitor
archetype.description: Visitors are embodiments of raw elemental energy that assume forms that are vaguely humanoid in shape. Unlike their lesser kin, Elemental Visitors are are capable of communication and understanding, although their motivations are seldom aligned with those of mortals.

taxonomy.name: Storm Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Storm.

runefrost0000000.name: Rune: Frost
runefrost0000000.description: You learn Rune of Frost, allowing you to channel the arcane element of ice.

gestureinfluence.name: Gesture: Influence
gestureinfluence.description:
You learn the Influence gesture, allowing you to heighten or diminish an arcane phenomenon at close range.

The Influence gesture is a stronger evolution of the Touch gesture, dealing more damage or healing but requiring 2 Action to perform.

coldAbsorption00.name: Cold Absorption
coldAbsorption00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within frigid environments. Its Cold resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

amorphous0000000.name: Amorphous
amorphous0000000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} may move through a space as narrow as 1 inch in diameter without any penalty to its Stride. It is immune to the @Condition[restrained] condition.

aqueousTransmiss.name: Aqueous Transmission
aqueousTransmiss.description: The @ref[name] is able to move instantaneously through water.

aqueousTransmission.name: Aqueous Transmission
aqueousTransmission.description: When the @ref[name] is within water, it can instantaneously transport itself to any unoccupied space within the same body of water up to 120 feet away. It does not need to be able to see the destination to make this Move.

falseAppearance0.name: False Appearance
falseAppearance0.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Frost.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You learn the Arrow gesture, allowing you to hurl a directed bolt of arcane power towards a distant target.

The Arrow gesture deals damage corresponding to the Rune used to a single enemy target at range.

runeearth0000000.description: You learn Rune of Earth, allowing you to control tectonic and corrosive forces.
